content.en:
For Kunwu Supreme's suggestion, the other Supremes discussed it.

Then.

The Mixed Yuan Supreme said: "It is not easy to kill all the great gods of the ghost clan, and there is no shortage of sons of the universe among the great god level of the ghost clan, although they are not as good as the sons of the universe of our human race, but if the ghost clan is bloody, using a large number of secret treasures to equip these great god-level sons of the universe is enough to close the gap between the sons of the universe of our two races." Besides, there is no such thing as a treasure in the Netherworld. "

Kunwu Supreme looked at the Mixed Yuan Supreme and explained: "Mixed Yuan Supreme, there is indeed no supreme treasure in the Netherworld, but our human race does, and the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain seems to have an extremely yin supreme treasure, at this time the ghost clan does not know about it, we can put it in the Netherworld, as if it was just bred, and create signs of the birth of the supreme treasure." As for killing the great god level of the ghost clan, this is not a difficult task. His Highness Wanfa has already broken through to the peak of the Great God Level, and it is not difficult to kill the Great God Level Son of the Ghost Clan with his strength. And this news, the ghost clan should not have mastered. "

"Has His Highness Wanfa become a great god?"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme was surprised.

He thought that Ye Tian would stay at the Great God Level for a long time, but he didn't expect to hit the Great God Level so soon.

The Divine Blade Supreme asked a question: "Kunwu Supreme, His Highness Wanfa's talent is indeed very rebellious, but he has impacted all the way from the emperor level to the great god level so quickly, and now his combat power has not been affected too much, right?"

"Even at the Great God level, he still belongs to His Royal Highness!"

Kunwu Supreme said.

"What, it still belongs to His Royal Highness!"

The other Supremes and Heavenly Venerables were stunned.

They also thought that Ye Tian had been lowered to the invincible level of the Eternal Ancient Highness or the first grade of the Eternal Ancient Highness.

If he is still at the supreme level, his strength will completely crush the ghost clan, because the ghost clan does not have a supreme level highness at the god level.

"His Highness Wanfa has the strength to destroy the Son of the Universe of the Demon Destroying Clan, I agree with this plan!"

"I agree with this plan too!"

"Agreed!"

One by one, the high-ranking Terran nods in agreement, and immediately looked at the Mixed Yuan Supreme.

The real decision is still vested in the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure still needs to be produced by the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, which has a certain risk, in case it fails, causing the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure to fall into the hands of the ghost clan, then the loss of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain will be too great, and it will fuel the strength of the ghost clan.

The Mixed Yuan Supreme was silent for a few minutes, and finally spoke: "Yes, on behalf of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, I can contribute that Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure." But if it's lost, the major supreme-level forces need to replenish some resources to the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, how about it?"

The other supreme-level divine consciousness transmissions exchanged voices, and they all agreed.

If this plan succeeds, it will be enough for the ghost clan to go crazy and even break the rules at all costs, and the human race can do it immediately.

At that time, once they occupy the territory of the ghost clan, the gains of the human race will be extremely huge, and their major forces will naturally be able to get more benefits.

For the sake of these benefits, it's worth taking a little risk.

Immediately, the major supremes launched specific plans according to this plan, and prepared detailed solutions according to various unexpected situations to ensure that this plan was foolproof.

......

The supreme temple of the Terrans.

After the Kunwu Supreme Meeting was over, he came back and immediately summoned Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian also soon came to the Kunwu Hall and met the Kunwu Supreme.

Kungo Temple.

Ye Tian saw the Kunwu Supreme and said, "I've seen the Kunwu Supreme!"

"Ye Tian, I called you here this time because there is a task that involves the development of the human race, so I hope you don't refuse. Kunwu Supreme said.

"What task?"

Ye Tian asked.

Immediately, the Kunwu Supreme said about the attack on the ghost clan.

"Let me destroy the gods of the ghost clan, this matter is no problem, I agree!"

Ye Tianying said.

The ghost clan has always been the enemy of mankind, and if the ghost clan can be destroyed, it will naturally be a good thing.

He can't help on the high-end battlefield, but if he helps in the god-level battlefield, he will definitely be duty-bound.

Subsequently.

Kunwu Supreme told Ye Tian the basic situation, so he asked Ye Tian to wait.

After all, the Netherworld is occupied by both the human race and the ghost race, and a contract agreement has been signed, and if the Netherworld is opened, it needs to be discussed with the ghost race.

And how to put the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure into the Netherworld, and create signs of the birth of the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure, this also needs to be arranged.

Therefore, there are many things that need to be done at the top of the human race, and everything must be completed before Ye Tian and the others can enter the netherworld.

Time passed, and three years passed in the blink of an eye.

Using these three years, Ye Tian compressed his immortal power, and practiced the seventh set of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Techniques to the consummation realm, and initially cultivated the eighth set of movements.

In addition, Ye Tian had also cultivated the third layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, but he had only barely cultivated a little, and he was far from reaching the consummation realm.

But even so, Ye Tian's physical limit has also increased a little.

It can be said that every moment, Ye Tian is getting stronger.

Compared to three years ago, Ye Tian is much stronger now, and he is powerful when he is placed among His Royal Highnesses!

this day.

Kunwu Supreme informed Ye Tian that the human race had discussed with the high-level of the ghost clan, and the netherworld would be opened in a year.

Once the Netherworld is opened, both the human race and the ghost clan's great god level can enter the Netherworld.

However, there is a netherworld aura in the netherworld, and there are many fierce creatures, which are very dangerous, so the mortality rate of ordinary great god-level entry is very high.

Those who really dare to enter the Netherworld must be a very powerful category among the great god level, at least they are also the great god level who have stepped into the peerless heavenly pride of seven or eight stars.

Once opened, there will be a special Great God Level carrying the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure and sending it to a certain place in the Netherworld to be arranged, creating signs of the birth of the Supreme Treasure.

When the time comes, the supreme level of the ghost clan will deduce the existence of the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure, and naturally a large number of powerful Great God Levels will be dispatched to prepare for the snatching of the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure.

"In this way, the Terrans will inevitably have losses!"

Ye Tian sighed.

But this can't be helped, there will inevitably be sacrifices on the road to expansion, and as long as the strength is strong, not only will it not be sacrificed, but it will also have great gains on such a god-level battlefield.

This is also an opportunity for the great god level.

And Ye Tian has only one task, to constantly kill the great god level of the ghost clan.

For this reason, Ye Tian would secretly enter the Netherworld and disguise himself as another great god, otherwise in his situation, once he appeared at the entrance of the Netherworld, he would be easily recognized.

At that time, once the ghost clan is afraid, it will be difficult to make the ghost clan suffer heavy losses.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian disguised himself as an ordinary Great God-level and mixed in with the Great God-level team of the Divine Blade Alliance, following the Nine Supreme-level Forces and the Great God-level Highness of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race to the Netherworld.

However, there are not many great god levels sent by the human race, and none of the powerful great god levels have been sent over.

After all, the human race must pretend that it is just an ordinary chance, otherwise it will definitely be a problem to send all the great god levels over!

Only when the vision of the birth of the Extreme Yin Supreme Treasure comes out, will the human race send additional god-level manpower to make a good appearance, so as not to arouse the suspicion of the ghost clan, and the plan can really succeed!
